user_prompt: Show jobs from companies in fintech, NYC or remote, that explicitly list TypeScript.
actual_output:
I can filter this, but I don’t have live job-board access in this chat session, so I won’t fabricate current openings.

### Filter Criteria I’ll Apply

| Requirement | Filter |
|---|---|
| Industry | Fintech companies only |
| Location | NYC, NYC-hybrid, or remote |
| Required keyword | Job description explicitly lists **TypeScript** |
| Exclude | Jobs that only mention JavaScript/React without TypeScript |
| Output | Company, role, location, salary if listed, platform, link, TypeScript context |

### Best Search Queries to Pull Matching Listings

Use these on LinkedIn, Indeed, Wellfound, Greenhouse, Lever, and company career pages:

```text
("TypeScript" AND fintech AND "New York") 
```

```text
("TypeScript" AND "Remote" AND fintech)
```

```text
("React" AND "TypeScript" AND "New York" AND payments)
```

```text
("TypeScript" AND "Senior Frontend Engineer" AND fintech)
```

```text
("TypeScript" AND "Full Stack Engineer" AND fintech AND remote)
```

### Fintech Companies to Prioritize

Likely sources for NYC/remote TypeScript roles:

| Company | Fintech Area | NYC/Remote Relevance |
|---|---|---|
| Stripe | Payments | Remote/NYC roles often available |
| Ramp | Corporate cards/spend management | NYC-based |
| Brex | Corporate finance | Remote-friendly |
| Plaid | Banking APIs | NYC/remote roles |
| Adyen | Payments | NYC office |
| Alloy | Identity/risk infrastructure | NYC-based |
| Riskified | Fraud prevention | NYC presence |
| Melio | B2B payments | NYC presence |
| Betterment | Wealthtech | NYC-based |
| Justworks | Payroll/HR fintech-adjacent | NYC-based |
| Modern Treasury | Payments infrastructure | Remote/NYC possible |
| Current | Consumer banking | NYC-based |
| Mercury | Banking for startups | Remote-friendly |
| Chime | Consumer banking | Remote/hybrid roles |
| Cash App / Block | Payments/consumer finance | Remote roles common |

### Send Me One of These and I’ll Produce the Shortlist

Upload or paste any of the following:

1. LinkedIn/Indeed search results  
2. Greenhouse/Lever job links  
3. A CSV export of jobs  
4. A list of company career pages  

I’ll return a table like this:

| Match | Company | Role | Location | TypeScript Mention | Salary | Link | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| High | Example Fintech | Senior Frontend Engineer | NYC/Remote | Required in core stack | $160K–$210K | URL | Strong React/TS match |

If you want, paste the job links here and I’ll filter them down to only fintech + NYC/remote + explicit TypeScript.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot substantively addressed the request by explaining its technical limitations regarding live data while providing highly relevant search queries, a list of target companies, and a clear path forward to process the data.
